profile_backed_target.baseline_command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-xxwa-cache-baseline rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-cache --bench cache_baseline -- --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1
profile_backed_target.hyperfine_command: hyperfine --warmup 3 --runs 10 --show-output 'CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-xxwa-hf-baseline rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-cache --bench cache_baseline -- cache_lookup/hit/in_memory --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1'

change.lever: Compare freshly computed SHA-256 digest bytes directly against stored lowercase hex during CacheManager::get, avoiding allocation of an intermediate hex String on hit lookup.

after.command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-xxwa-cache-after rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-cache --bench cache_baseline -- cache_lookup/hit/in_memory --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: yes; lookup still performs exactly one backend get and returns Hit, Corrupted, or Miss from the same branches.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: N/A; no ordering or priority decisions are introduced.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A; no random inputs or seeds.
isomorphism_proof.cache_key_determinism: unchanged; build_cache_key and sha256_hex remain intact, and existing golden cache-key tests passed.
isomorphism_proof.integrity_semantics: unchanged; lowercase exact digest hits, uppercase digest, short digest, and wrong digest reject exactly like String equality with a lowercase actual hex string.

validation: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-xxwa-fj-cache-verify2 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-cache --all-targets (94 tests passed plus bench harness smoke)
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-xxwa-fj-cache-verify2 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-cache --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings
